_VerifiedCollectionSchema.description: Output schema used by legacy ToolExecutor.dispatch validation.
_VerifiedCollectionSchema.title: _VerifiedCollectionSchema

city_code.description: Official TAGO cityCode from the provider getCtyCodeList contract. Common metropolitan examples: Busan=21, Daegu=22, Incheon=23, Gwangju=24, Daejeon=25, Ulsan=26.
city_code.title: City Code

node_nm.description: Optional client-side filter against the official TAGO response field nodenm. Use it to narrow a route's passing stops to a citizen-named place such as 부산역.
node_nm.title: Node Nm

route_id.description: Official TAGO routeId returned by tago_bus_route_search.
route_id.title: Route Id

updown_cd.description: Optional client-side filter against the official TAGO response field updowncd when a direction is already known.
updown_cd.title: Updown Cd
